data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): When appending RED markers to .test-index, DO NOT create a new entry for brainstorm/SKILL.md if one already exists. Instead, append the 3 new [test_phase*] marker lines to the EXISTING brainstorm/SKILL.md entry in .test-index. Verify: grep -c 'brainstorm/SKILL.md' .test-index should return 1 (one entry, multiple markers lines under it) not 3 or more separate entries.
